texto: The idea that we should write towards the unknown aspects of our experience was totally groundbreaking for me. It gave me the license I needed to try to write outside myself. This attitude has deeply informed my approach to fiction, emboldening me to write characters with voices or situations that are vastly different from my own.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Molly Antopol sobre temas ligados a autoestima. A afirmação “The idea that we should write towards the unknown aspects of our experience was totally groundbre…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, experience, myself, útil em momentos de myself e me.

This attitude has deeply informed my approach to fiction, emboldening me to write characters with voices or situations that are vastly different from my own.

texto: But for the first time, Boaz couldn't think of a single word to describe this kind of loneliness, so scary and real it required an entirely different language, new and strange and yet to be invented
explicacao: Citação de Molly Antopol sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “But for the first time, Boaz couldn't think of a single word to describe this kind of loneliness,…” articula reflexao, lonely, sadness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como sadness.
